arts.sum: Tottenham are chasing their fifth win on the bounce in all competitions when they take on Ferencvaros on Matchday 2 of their Europa League campaign on Thursday evening. Many regard the Europa League as a competition Spurs should harbour great hopes of winning.

With us in Puskas' home city, Ange was asked, 'you've got a special connection with Ferenc Puskas, how do you remember those years and what are you expecting from tomorrow?' Ange was coached by all-time great Ferenc Puskas during his playing days at South Melbourne.

arts.ttl: Latest Tottenham injury news for Ferencvaros amid Son and Udogie update
arts.sum: Son Heung-min was absent from the 3-0 win entirely after suffering a hamstring issue in the clash against Qarabag earlier that week, which Spurs won by the same score line, with Postecoglou now offering new updates on the duo. With all of that being said, football.london has rounded up the latest Tottenham injury news and the potential return dates of all four stars currently absent.

arts.ttl: James Maddison admits he is eager to prove people wrong as Tottenham midfielder aims to get back into England squad after Euros snub
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW: The Tottenham midfielder was cut from Gareth Southgate's squad for the Euros and not included in Lee Carsley's first selection as England's interim boss, last month.

arts.ttl: James Maddison feeling fitter than ever as he targets England return
arts.sum: Maddison has worked with Lee Carsley at Coventry and England Under-21s.

arts.ttl: Report: What Ange Postecoglou will do with Timo Werner after missing big chances for Tottenham vs Man United
arts.sum: Timo Werner earned a rare start for Tottenham Hotspur last weekend as he featured in the 3-0 win against Manchester United at Old Trafford. Goals...

arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Europa League clash between Ferencvaros and Tottenham Hotspur.

Ange Postecoglou issues double Tottenham injury update as exiled defender recalled
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou confirms whether Son Heung-min and Destiny Udogie will be fit for Tottenham Hotspur's Europa League clash with Ferencvaros on Thursday.
